title: cerasus triloba
intro: Cerasus triloba, also known as the Korean mountain ash or the Korean white cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, leaves, and flowers, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Cerasus triloba include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cerasus triloba include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the bark, leaves, and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
